prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock *TZ220X* 2.0L plug-in hybrid powertrain (combined 1,000+ hp) with a *Weichai WP13H* 13.0L diesel crate engine (1,500 Nm torque) paired to a *ZF 8HP90X* 8-speed off-road transmission with reinforced torque converter and *Eaton ELocker* differentials on all four axles for extreme articulation.

Forced Induction: Install a *Garrett GTX5544R* turbocharger with a *Tial MV-R* 64mm wastegate and *Precision Turbo* 1000HP intercooler core, coupled with a *Nitrous Express* direct-port nitrous kit (150-shot) for overlanding boost spikes.

Suspension: Swap to *Fox Racing 2.5 Factory Series DSC* coilovers with *King Off-Road* bypass shocks (4.0-inch diameter, 24-inch travel) and *TeraFlex* JK Unlimited long-arm kit with *Currie Enterprises* 60mm axle tubes for rock-crawling durability.
estetica: Body Armor: *Poison Spyder* custom front/rear bumpers with *Warn Zeon 12-S* winch and *ARB* rock sliders, reinforced with *Heighliner* exo-cage (military-grade 4130 chromoly tubing) for rollover protection.

Aerodynamics: *Rigid Industries* 50-inch LED light bar with *Baja Designs* Squadron Pro auxiliary pods, paired with a *Rampage* snorkel kit (extended to 3.5m) and *Slee Off-Road* fender flares (3-inch wider track for 42-inch tires).

Wheels/Tires: *Method MR701* beadlock wheels (17x9, -38mm offset) wrapped in *Nitto Trail Grappler* 42x14.5R17 tires with *BFGoodrich* Krawler T/A KX tread pattern, mounted on *Dynatrac* Pro-Rock 60 axles with *Yukon Gear* 5.38:1 ring-and-pinion.
